memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Webber Snapshot (Miner Descent)
memoryArtifacts.description: Thomas was living at Reskeagan [now Georgetown], an island near the mouth of the Kennebec, as early as 1649. He married Mary, daughter of the proprietor, John Parker, and owned immense tracts of land …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Webber於大約1629年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Webber26歲，母親Phillipa Jonson20歲。他於大約1655年與Mary Parker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1687年2月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Webber于大约1629年出生在英国时，他的父亲Thomas Webber26岁，母亲Phillipa Jonson20岁。他于大约1655年与Mary Parker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1687年2月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Webber was born about 1629, in England, his father, Thomas Webber, was 26 and his mother, Phillipa Jonson, was 20. He married Mary Parker about 1655, in Province of Maine, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in February 1687, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Webber est né environ 1629, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Webber, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Phillipa Jonson, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mary Parker environ 1655, à Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en février 1687, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Webberが約1629年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Webberは26歳，母Phillipa Jonsonは20歳であった。約1655年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインでMary Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1687年2月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Webber(이)가 대략 1629년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Webber(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Phillipa Jonson(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹에서 Mary Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1687년 2월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Webber nasceu aproximadamente 1629, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Webber, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Phillipa Jonson, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Parker aproximadamente 1655, em Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1687, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 59 anos.

ru.Province of Maine, British Colonial Amer: провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Webber родился около 1629 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Webber было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillipa Jonson, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Parker около 1655 г. в местности провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер февраль 1687 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Webber nació aproximadamente 1629, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Webber, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Phillipa Jonson, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mary Parker aproximadamente 1655, en Province of Maine, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en febrero de 1687, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 59 años.
